description_long: This is a rectangular, single-story storage locker structure with a flat, dark roof and brick-patterned exterior walls. The front side features three large metal doors in different colors—red, green, and blue—each likely providing access to separate storage compartments. The doors are solid, with visible hinges and simple handles, and one blue door is shown partially open, revealing a dark, empty interior. The brickwork is weathered, with some green moss or grime along the lower edge, suggesting outdoor placement and exposure to the elements. The side and rear walls are plain, with no windows or additional features, emphasizing security and privacy. The overall appearance is utilitarian, suitable for use in urban environments such as parking lots, alleys, or residential complexes.
description: A rectangular brick storage locker with a flat dark roof and three large colored metal doors, designed for secure outdoor storage. The structure is weathered and utilitarian, with visible handles and one open door.
description_view_0: Front view showing three large metal doors—red, green, and blue—set in a brick wall, with weathering and grime at the base.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain brick wall with no doors or windows, and the edge of the flat roof.
description_view_2: Rear view with two large blue metal doors, one of which is open, revealing the dark interior; brick wall is otherwise unadorned.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a plain brick wall with no openings, similar to the other side.
